task: Create only a focused local test: ensure staging/tests/ exists and write a single dummy file staging/tests/test_logic.py containing a clear syntax error (for example "def broken(: pass"), then run a single-file syntax check using python -m py_compile staging/tests/test_logic.py to capture the exact compiler error output, save the compiler output and a short summary (violation details, watchdog flags if any, and the final decision "BLOCKED — promotion prevented") into staging/diagnostics/bridge_syntax_gate_report.md, do not add or modify any bridge orchestration scripts or core modules, do not attempt to move/copy the file into modules/, do not commit changes, and clean up any temporary artifacts so modules/ remains unchanged.
